commits.messageBody: This commit implements the POST /v1/merchants/register and GET /v1/merchants/:id endpoints. It introduces a PostgreSQL repository that enforces email uniqueness, secure API key generation, and strips sensitive fields on retrieval. It also correctly attaches the auth middleware to the /:id endpoint for secure scoping.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(merchants): add merchant registration and profile endpoints (#13)

commits.messageBody: This commit introduces endpoints to update merchant webhook URLs and rotate API keys. We need these config endpoints to allow merchants to programmatically receive events and securely cycle their authentication credentials without manual intervention.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(merchants): add webhook url config and api key rotation endpoints

commits.messageBody:
…zod error

To comply strictly with the Acceptance Criteria for P04, we must explicitly throw an AppError with the INVALID_WEBHOOK_URL code when a user submits an HTTP URL, rather than relying on Zod to throw a generic error.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(merchants): return INVALID_WEBHOOK_URL error code instead of raw …

commits.messageBody: This feature allows merchants to onboard their vendors seamlessly. It directly connects the onboarding flow to the Nomba Sandbox API so that each new vendor is immediately provisioned with a Dedicated Virtual Account (DVA) under a unique composite accountRef. This eliminates manual mapping efforts and ensures consistent payment routing per vendor.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(vendors): add vendor onboarding endpoint

commits.messageBody:
Refactor the dashboard package to align with strict engineering guidelines:
- Add tsconfig baseUrl and noUncheckedIndexedAccess options.
- Rename components to kebab-case (layout.tsx, sidebar.tsx).
- Setup Zod-validated environment config and front-end logger using pino.
- Rewrite API client using AppError and Zod validation schemas.
- Add mobile drawer dialogue accessibility roles and aria tags.
- Write unit tests for API client with mock fetch responses.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(dashboard): scaffold layout, sidebar, api client, and unit tests
chore: merge feat/dashboard-scaffold into feat/registration-ui

commits.messageBody:
Refactor the merchant registration flow and API key display components:
- Rename ApiKeyDisplay to kebab-case api-key-display.tsx.
- Implement strict business name length validation in registerSchema.
- Refactor shouldShowError to return a clean boolean.
- Add screen reader aria-label and aria-pressed attributes to key reveal toggle.
- Integrate AppError and pino logger in fallback handlers and api errors.
- Remove non-existent scrollbar-none class.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(dashboard): align registration screen with engineering standards
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/feat/vendor-onboarding' into fea…

commits.messageBody:
Implement S03 vendor UI and supporting backend endpoints:
- Add vendor list page with status filter tabs, pagination, and responsive grid.
- Add vendor creation form with Zod validation and DVA copyable success screen.
- Create reusable vendor-card component with status badges and action buttons.
- Implement suspend confirmation and API key generation modals with a11y.
- Extend backend: list, suspend, and generateApiKey in repo/service/controller/routes.
- Add unit tests for new service methods (list, suspend, key generation).
- Fix ESLint unused-var warnings with underscore-prefixed destructuring.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(dashboard): vendor creation + management UI
